directive: Governance Instruction - Phase V.2 Gate-Blocked Stabilization Plan v1.0

mapping_activation_audit.notes: No runtime read path in engine_skeleton.
Canonical MB_eff mapping active and clipped to [-0.2,+0.2].

mapping_activation_audit.gate_dependency: If activated from archetype, ODW=5 regression required
mapping_activation_audit.notes: Combat reads UnitState.offense_defense_weight, but test initialization does not map archetype ODW into UnitState.
evaluate_target() is archetype-independent nearest-enemy centroid heading.
Canonical FR mapping active in cohesion, movement composition, and FSR k_f.

issues: Mirror/Jitter/Overhead were judged per-case against a single FR5_MB5 reference, mixing behavioral variance with gate ownership.
Runtime overhead was computed as case-level delta vs FR5_MB5, which is scenario-dependent rather than ownership-stable.
Validation matrix assumption was implicit (A-variant, B-neutral) and not treated as explicit ownership contract.

aligned_ownership_now.scenario_collection: FR in {2,5,8}, MB in {2,5,8} on Fleet-A variant; Fleet-B fixed neutral (FR=5, MB=5); mirrored companion run for each case.
aligned_ownership_now.seed_strategy: Deterministic pipeline; each case run twice for digest equality (no stochastic branch).
aligned_ownership_now.mirror_metric: Macro mean_abs_antisym_error = mean(|M_ab + M_ba|) over 9 paired cases; degradation = new/old - 1.
aligned_ownership_now.jitter_metric: Macro mean jitter count over same 9-case set; degradation = new/old - 1.
aligned_ownership_now.overhead_metric: Macro mean per_tick_seconds over same 9-case set; overhead = new/old - 1.

applied: MB hot-path optimization: target-axis normalization moved from per-unit to per-fleet/per-tick cache in integrate_movement().

retained: Canonical MB mapping formula and clip range unchanged.
MB=0 (mobility_bias=5) legacy-equivalent path retained for bitwise regression.
